message:
feat(demo_showcase): comprehensive snapshot test suite

Add tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs with capability-matrix tests:
- Test matrix covering multiple capability presets (ideal, minimal, no_hyperlinks)
- Test matrix covering multiple terminal sizes (80x24, 120x40, 160x50)
- Each combination generates deterministic snapshot using --headless-size
- Uses insta for snapshot management with meaningful assertion names

Refactor demo_showcase.rs for better testability:
- Extract rendering logic into testable functions
- Ensure deterministic output with fixed seed in headless mode
- Improve --headless-check integration with snapshot tests
- Clean up panic hook installation to avoid double-install in tests

The snapshot suite enables regression detection for visual output
across different terminal environments and capability levels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
